hero.subtitle: The real-estate marketplace where consultants' performance is measured fairly, updated every month, and shown openly. Lisbon & Porto.

howItWorks.title: Where Performance Meets Real Estate
howItWorks.lede: Every consultant is judged by the same criteria, in plain sight. No paid placements, no favours — just real performance, recalculated every month.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Position reflects verified results — close rate, response time and satisfaction — not the number of listings published.
howItWorks.step2Desc: The ranking restarts every month. Recent performance is what counts; no one is stuck with what they did years ago.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Those who start with good service rise fast. Seniority doesn't buy a place at the top — the work does.

agentCta.title: <gold>Success</gold> depends on you.
agentCta.body1: Through a transparent evaluation and ranking system, your performance gains visibility.
agentCta.body2: We genuinely value every consultant's work, in a model where merit, performance and results are recognised fairly.

consultores.title: Find the right consultant
consultores.subtitle: Compare on real performance over the last 90 days. Recomputed monthly.
consultores.risingTalentSubtitle: Consultants active under 6 months — judged separately, for a fair race.

cta.title: Can't find what you're looking for? <gold>Talk to a consultant.</gold>
cta.body: Our best-rated consultants help you find the right property — at no cost to you.

sobre.h1: Trust you earn, not trust you claim.
sobre.lead: RealFairTrust started with a simple question: why does choosing a real-estate consultant still depend on who spends most on advertising — and not on who works best?
sobre.problemBody: On traditional portals, the properties come first and the consultant is a footnote. Visibility is for sale; real performance — who responds, who closes, who leaves clients satisfied — stays invisible.
sobre.responseBody: We reversed the order. On RealFairTrust you choose the consultant first, on measured merit — and merit renews: a 90-day window, recomputed every month. Nobody lives on old reputation; whoever is on top had to earn it this month.

fairness.title: Fairness
fairness.body: New consultants compete on quality per opportunity, not volume; there is a dedicated board for rising talent.

honesty.title: Honest data
honesty.body: We never show a number we don't trust; what is a demonstration is labelled as a demonstration.

portugal.title: All of Portugal
portugal.body: From the mainland to Madeira and the Azores.

termos.title: Terms and Conditions
termos.draftBanner: Draft document — subject to legal review before launch.

s1.title: Purpose
s1.body: These Terms govern use of the RealFairTrust platform, which connects clients (buyers, sellers and renters) to real-estate consultants based on measured performance.

s2.title: Role of the platform
s2.body: RealFairTrust is a contact-intermediation platform. It is not a party to any deal, brokerage agreement or real-estate transaction between clients and consultants. We do not provide real-estate brokerage services.

s3.title: Consultant accounts
s3.body: Consultant access requires registration and approval. The consultant is responsible for the accuracy of their profile information and for compliance with the legal obligations applicable to real-estate brokerage activity in Portugal.

s4.title: Performance rating
s4.body: Scores and rankings result from measured signals, following the published methodology. RealFairTrust does not guarantee commercial results from ranking position.

s5.title: Conduct
s5.body: Manipulating performance signals, submitting false reviews and any abusive use of the platform are prohibited.

s6.title: Limitation of liability
s6.body: RealFairTrust is not responsible for the acts, omissions or breaches of consultants or clients, nor for the outcome of any transaction.

s7.title: Governing law
s7.body: These Terms are governed by Portuguese law.

privacidade.title: Privacy Policy
privacidade.draftBanner: Draft document — subject to legal review before launch.

s1.title: Data controller
s1.body: RealFairTrust. [Controller identity and contact to be defined before launch.]

s2.title: Data we collect
s2.body: Contact details submitted in forms (name, email or phone, message) and strictly necessary technical data (including consent cookies).

s3.title: Purpose and legal basis
s3.body: Contact details are processed to route your request to the selected consultant, based on your consent and the legitimate interest in providing the requested service.

s4.title: Cookies
s4.body: We use cookies necessary for operation and consent-based cookies, managed through the cookie banner.

s5.title: Retention
s5.body: Data is kept only for as long as necessary for the purposes described. [Concrete periods to be defined before launch.]

s6.title: Your rights (GDPR)
s6.body: You have the right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection, and the right to lodge a complaint with the Portuguese data protection authority (CNPD).

s7.title: Contact
s7.body: [Contact for exercising rights to be defined before launch.]

comoFunciona.h1: First the consultant. Then the home.
comoFunciona.lead: Three steps from first click to the right person.

s1.title: Step 1 — Compare on merit.
s1.body: Every consultant has a public score built on real work from the last 90 days: client satisfaction, close rate, response time, conversion and activity. There are no paid positions.

s2.title: Step 2 — Choose with confidence.
s2.body: Open the profile: specialisation, coverage area, verified reviews and the detail behind each signal. If a consultant doesn't yet have enough track record, we say so — "Building track record" — instead of inventing a number.

s3.title: Step 3 — Talk directly.
s3.body: Contact the consultant from their profile. No middlemen, no cost to you — clients never pay anything.

score60.title: The score in 60 seconds
score60.window: A rolling 90-day window, recomputed monthly — the top spot is re-earned every month.

comoFunciona.greenNote: Green seal = verification. When you see green on RealFairTrust, it means one thing: verified.

metodologia.lead: The score is the heart of RealFairTrust. This page explains exactly how it works — because a rating only deserves trust if it can be scrutinised.

s1.title: The time model.
s1.body: A rolling 90-day window, recomputed on the 1st of every month. We deliberately rejected a lifetime cumulative score: after a year, a good new consultant could never catch a veteran, and the leaderboard would fossilise. With a rolling window, whoever is on top has to keep earning it.

satisfaction.measures: Client reviews across four dimensions: communication, knowledge, negotiation, availability

closeRate.why: Promising is easy; closing is merit.

response.measures: Time to first response and follow-through

activity.measures: Enough data for a fair measurement
activity.why: A score needs a statistical base.

s3.title: Per-opportunity normalisation.
s3.body: We measure quality per opportunity handled, not raw volume. Five excellent outcomes can outweigh twenty mediocre ones. An excellent part-time consultant is not penalised against a mediocre full-time one.

s4.title: Fairness for newcomers.
s4.body: Consultants with less than 6 months of activity compete on their own Rising Talent board. And until a consultant has handled enough opportunities for a statistically fair score, the number is not shown — the profile reads "Building track record". We would rather show no number than a misleading one.

s5.title: Integrity.
s5.body: Reviews are tied to real client interactions and are moderated. In later phases: verified-transaction gating — a review only counts after a confirmed closing — and automated anti-abuse controls. Fake signals destroy trust — and trust is the product.

s6.title: What the score is NOT.
s6.body: It cannot be bought. It is not influenced by the Pro subscription. It is not editable by us case by case. The methodology is the same for everyone.

attribution.title: Data source
attribution.body: Administrative data (District · Municipality · Parish) from the Official Administrative Map of Portugal — CAOP 2025, Direção-Geral do Território (DGT).

vender.title: Put your property in the hands of <gold>the top performers</gold> in your area.
vender.lede: Choose where your property is and meet the consultants who cover it, ranked by merit — real performance over the last 90 days, not seniority or ad spend.

merit.title: Choose on merit
merit.body: See the consultants in your area ranked by their performance score — those who deliver results show up first.

fair.title: Transparent comparison
fair.body: The same metrics for everyone: satisfaction, close rate, responsiveness and conversion. No bought placements.

free.title: Free for you
free.body: Talking to a consultant is free for sellers and landlords. Choose, contact and decide with no obligation.

vender.howTitle: From your property to the right consultant, in three steps

steps.s1: Tell us where your property is — district, municipality or parish.
steps.s2: See the consultants who cover that area, ranked by performance.
steps.s3: Contact whoever you choose directly, from their profile.

vender.locationLede: Narrow down to the parish for the closest match; if there's no consultant at that level yet, we show who covers the surrounding area.
